proof_points.title: Approved evidence only
proof_points.description: Bidworx is designed to answer from structured source records and to refuse unsupported procurement claims.

proof_points.title: Deterministic readiness scoring
proof_points.description: Opportunity scores are assembled from explicit scoring dimensions, weights, and rule-based evidence checks.

proof_points.title: Source chips for reviewer trust
proof_points.description: Answers include evidence/source chips so bid teams can see which record type supports the response.

proof_points.title: Compliance-first workflow
proof_points.description: Mandatory requirements, submission instructions, and pass/fail risks are treated separately from scored quality responses.
